symbols: winged figure — the muse or angel of inspiration descending from above
kiss on forehead — the transmission of divine or artistic inspiration
sleeping or reclining man — the receptive human mind open to inspiration
writing desk — the creative vocation awaiting expression
blue light from above — heavenly illumination
description: A winged female figure in a pink flowing gown bends over a man seated or slumped in a chair at a desk, kissing his forehead. The man wears dark clothing and appears to be asleep or in a swoon. Large white wings spread behind the female figure. A beam of blue light enters from the upper left. The desk has a sheet of paper on it. The rest of the scene is dark, with the two figures dramatically illuminated.
